languages.text: "Вы можете наказать меня по своему разумению, Лорд-капитан. Но я и правда сделал все, что в моих силах". {n}Пилот покорно склоняет голову.{/n}

traits.locale_text: вы меня можете наказать как вернетесь, но дальше реально никак, я останусь посторожу

languages.text: "You may punish me as you see fit, Lord Captain. But I truly did everything within my power." {n}The pilot bows his head meekly.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Вы можете наказать меня по своему разумению, Лорд-капитан. Но я и правда сделал все, что в моих силах". {n}Пилот покорно склоняет голову.{/n}

"You may punish me as you see fit, Lord Captain. But I truly did everything within my power." {n}The pilot bows his head meekly.{/n}
"You may punish me as you see fit, Lord Captain. But I truly did everything within my power." {n}The pilot bows his head meekly.{/n}

languages.text: 「ご都合の良いように罰して頂いても構いません、艦長様。ただ、私は尽力したことをお約束します。」{n}パイロットは頭を下げて謙虚に言った。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You may punish me as you see fit, Lord Captain. But I truly did everything within my power." {n}The pilot bows his head meekly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ご都合の良いように罰して頂いても構いません、艦長様。ただ、私は尽力したことをお約束します。」{n}パイロットは頭を下げて謙虚に言った。{/n}

languages.text: «Castígueme como considere oportuno, Lord Capitán, pero de verdad que he hecho todo cuanto estaba en mi mano». {n}El piloto agacha la cabeza humildemente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You may punish me as you see fit, Lord Captain. But I truly did everything within my power." {n}The pilot bows his head meekly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Castígueme como considere oportuno, Lord Capitán, pero de verdad que he hecho todo cuanto estaba en mi mano». {n}El piloto agacha la cabeza humildemente.{/n}

languages.text: “随您怎么罚我，舰长大人。可我确实已竭尽所能了。”{n}飞行员畏缩地低下了头。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You may punish me as you see fit, Lord Captain. But I truly did everything within my power." {n}The pilot bows his head meekly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “随您怎么罚我，舰长大人。可我确实已竭尽所能了。”{n}飞行员畏缩地低下了头。{/n}

languages.text: "Bestraft mich, wie Ihr es für richtig haltet, Lord Captain. Aber ich habe wirklich getan, was ich konnte." {n}Der Pilot senkt widerspruchslos den Kopf.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You may punish me as you see fit, Lord Captain. But I truly did everything within my power." {n}The pilot bows his head meekly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bestraft mich, wie Ihr es für richtig haltet, Lord Captain. Aber ich habe wirklich getan, was ich konnte." {n}Der Pilot senkt widerspruchslos den Kopf.{/n}

languages.text: "Beni uygun gördüğünüz şekilde cezalandırabilirsiniz Lord Kaptan. Ancak gerçekten elimden gelen her şeyi yaptım." {n}Pilot uysalca başını eğiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You may punish me as you see fit, Lord Captain. But I truly did everything within my power." {n}The pilot bows his head meekly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Beni uygun gördüğünüz şekilde cezalandırabilirsiniz Lord Kaptan. Ancak gerçekten elimden gelen her şeyi yaptım." {n}Pilot uysalca başını eğiyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Punissez-moi comme vous l'estimez juste, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Mais je vous assure avoir fait tout mon possible. » {n}Le pilote incline docilement la tête.{/n}
